name: tabh2o
description: TabH2O agent skills and plugins — tabular foundation model predictions for Claude Code and other agent harnesses.

plugins.name: tabh2o
plugins.description: Makes predictions on tabular data using the TabH2O foundation model API. Supports classification, regression (including timeseries forecasting), clustering, missing value imputation, and anomaly detection, with optional global feature importance for classification and regression. Send data as JSON or CSV, get results back.
